nasb.text: What more can David still say to You concerning the honor bestowed on Your servant? For You know Your servant.

esv.text: And what more can David say to you for honoring your servant? For you know your servant.

cnv.text: 你把榮耀加在你僕人身上，我還有甚麼話可以對你說呢？你認識你的僕人。

ccb.text: 你将尊荣加于仆人，我还能说什么？因为你了解仆人。
